author: Joannes Martinez de Prado
title: De eucharistiae sanctissimo sacramento et divino missae, q. 83
remarks: Moral theology. pp. 824 ff: Dubium XX: Classification of literature on the Mass: his is moral theology. He omits discussion of single ceremonies, only focusing on a defense of the Dominican manner of communing. Moral questions on preparation for Mass, ommission of words, etc. Dubium XXI: De iis quae in celebratione missae aguntur.
